hero.title: A refined stay for business and leisure
hero.subtitle: Premium apartments in Ulqin with a practical location, sea-view stays, and a calm hospitality experience close to the coast.

intro.title: Designed for relaxed stays in Ulqin
intro.description: Dijari Premium combines a calm apartment-style stay with a practical location in Ulqin. It is suited for guests who want easy access to the coast, a peaceful atmosphere, and a modern, well-kept space to return to.
items: Comfortable apartments with a premium, private feel
Sea-view and poolside experience across selected stays
Convenient access to beaches, dining, and city routes
A practical base for both short trips and longer stays

experience.title: A stay shaped by sea views, quiet comfort, and easy access around Ulqin
experience.subtitle: From poolside moments to open views and a location that keeps you close to the coast, Dijari Premium is designed for guests who want both relaxation and convenience in one place.

cards.title: Sea-view apartments
cards.description: Wake up to open Adriatic views and calm private terraces in Ulqin.

cards.title: Poolside mornings
cards.description: A relaxed setting for long summer days and quiet evening breaks.

cards.title: Comfort near everything
cards.description: Well connected to the beach, city centre, and key points around Ulqin.

cards.title: Comfort
cards.desc: Thoughtful interiors, calm rooms, and a stay that feels private and easy.

cards.title: Location
cards.desc: A convenient Ulqin location near the coast, beaches, and everyday essentials.

cards.title: Experience
cards.desc: Sea views, pool moments, and a more elevated holiday atmosphere.
